name: html-effectiveness
description: Routes agent output to single self-contained .html files based on Thariq Shihipar's html-effectiveness pattern catalog. 20 canonical patterns (triage board, status report, code review, design system, prompt tuner, etc.) with a fuzzy bilingual (EN+DE) decision tree so Claude picks the right pattern per task. Triggers eagerly on intent — not literal phrase — across English and German. Includes OTel semconv generator demo as concrete proof. Vendor-fork of https://github.com/ThariqS/html-effectiveness by Thariq Shihipar (@trq212, Claude Code @ Anthropic).
